title: claytonia gilliesii
intro: Claytonia gilliesii, also known as the Pink Purslane or Miner's Lettuce, is a perennial flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This succulent plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of vitamins A and C, as well as its flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Claytonia gilliesii include its potential to support cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and exhibit anti-cancer properties, making it a valuable herb for overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Claytonia gilliesii is often used as an infusion, tincture, or salve to harness its medicinal properties, and it can also be consumed as a leafy green vegetable in salads and smoothies.
